## formspecWithValidation() function

Creates a complete form specification with validation options.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function formspecWithValidation<const Elements extends readonly FormElement[]>(
  options: FormSpecOptions,
  ...elements: Elements
): FormSpec<Elements>;
```

## Parameters

<table><thead><tr><th>

Parameter

</th><th>

Type

</th><th>

Description

</th></tr></thead>
<tbody><tr><td>

options

</td><td>

[FormSpecOptions](./dsl.formspecoptions.md)

</td><td>

Validation options

</td></tr>
<tr><td>

elements

</td><td>

Elements

</td><td>

The top-level form elements

</td></tr>
</tbody></table>

**Returns:**

[FormSpec](./dsl.formspec.md)<!-- -->&lt;Elements&gt;

A FormSpec descriptor

## Example

```typescript
const form = formspecWithValidation(
  { validate: true, name: "MyForm" },
  field.text("name"),
  field.enum("status", ["draft", "sent"] as const),
  when(is("status", "draft"), field.text("notes"))
);
```
